body.p1: Download links and checksums appear only for real built files. No fake node, wallet, or checksum links are shown.
body.p2: Download the real Linux x86_64 HOBC node package. Both Linux builds include hobbyhashd, hobbyhash-cli, hobbyhash-wallet, hobbyhash-tx, and hobbyhash-util.
body.p3: Use this standard Linux x86_64 build for current Linux systems with compatible runtime libraries.
body.p4: Use this build for AlmaLinux 9, RHEL 9, Rocky 9, and other EL9-compatible servers. Built separately to avoid GLIBCXX runtime errors on EL9 systems.
body.p5: Regular users should download the turnkey HobbyHash Wallet installer. It bundles the HOBC node, starts it locally, creates an encrypted wallet, syncs over P2P, and keeps RPC private on this computer.
body.p6: These download entries are managed from the admin panel and only published rows are shown.

meta.description: Official HobbyHash Coin downloads for the HOBC Linux node and Windows wallet installer, with SHA256 checksums and private RPC safety notes.
meta.title: Downloads
notice.rpc_private: Mainnet RPC 18762 is local/private only. Do not expose or forward RPC.
notice.wallet_rpc_fallback: If 127.0.0.1:18762 is already in use by another local HOBC node, the wallet automatically uses another private local RPC port. Advanced users can still use the separate cold/watch wallet files in the same downloads folder.
